_setup: Ask Griffin for the credentials.json file — do NOT create your own Google Cloud project.
_how_it_works: 1. Griffin adds you as a test user in the Google Cloud Console OAuth consent screen
2. Griffin sends you the credentials.json file (drop it in the project root)
5. First run opens a browser — sign in with your Gmail and approve access
6. A token.json is saved locally so you only auth once
7. The script searches your Gmail for Citibike/Lyft receipts and outputs data/rides.json
